snippet.title: Devil Dinosaur: Prehistoric Powerhouse | Character Reveal Trailer | Marvel Rivals
snippet.description:
From the prehistoric past to the front lines of Manhattan. 🦖
Ripped across dimensions and escaped from the Collector’s Gallery, Devil Dinosaur has arrived to protect the innocent. With the perfect balance of Moon Girl's brains and his own raw brawn, this dino-riffic hero is ready to stomp through Alchemax HQ to save his BFF. Don't let the name scare you—this gentle giant is a true powerhouse, armed with razor-sharp fangs and a force-field shield.

Season 8 arrives on May 15, 2026!  

Brains, brawn, and a thunderous roar... the prehistoric hero is here.​

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

When music made us all unite

Forget about the price tag

Ain't about the, yeah, ba-bling, ba-bling
Wanna make the world dance
Forget about the price tag

[Verse 3: B.o.B]
Yeah, yeah, well, keep the price tag (Yeah) and take the cash back
Just give me six strings (Six strings) and a half-stack (Half stack)
And you can, can keep the cars, leave me the garage
And all I, yes, all I need are keys and guitars
And guess what? Uh, in thirty seconds, I'm leaving to Mars (Mars)
Yeah, we leaping across (-cross) these undefeatable odds (Odds)
It's like this, man, you can't put a price on a life (Nah-ah)
We do this for the love, so we fight and sacrifice (Yuh) every night
So we ain't gon' stumble and fall, never, nah
Waiting to see this in the sign of defeat, uh-uh
So we gon' keep everyone moving their feet
So bring back the beat and then everyone sing
It's not about the money

[Chorus: Jessie J & B.o.B]
It's not about the money, money, money
We don't need your money, money, money
We just wanna make the world dance
Forget about the price tag

Forget about the price tag (Forget about the price tag)

[Outro: Jessie J]
(Ah, ah)
(Ah, ah)
(Ah, ah) Yeah, yeah, woah

snippet.title: Five Nights at Treasure Island (2026) - Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Trailer for the last FNaF project from the Radiance Team, the official remake of Five Nights at Treasure Island. Coming soon!

The year is 2003. Strange rumors have surfaced about odd occurrences regarding Disney's abandoned Discovery Island. Combined with the attraction's already sordid past, a small group of people are commissioned to investigate the validity of these rumors and hopefully lay them to rest. However, something has gone horribly wrong.

In a vain attempt to recoup their losses, one last intern is sent to the island to pick up the pieces of their research and recover what they can, but it quickly becomes apparent that this island is far from abandoned.

Check out the game here: https://gamejolt.com/games/fnati/829806

TRAILER PRODUCTION TEAM
Direction: Nocturna
Editing: Jesterslumber, Jackwald, Monste, Bilnog
3D Modeling: Sackhead, Nomok
Animation: WaningLucidity, Monste
Soundtrack & Sound Design: Lithoan, Nocturna, Monste
Rendering: Steals, Gum
Additional Footage: Clubbo, Steals

Special thanks to Anart1996 and Slimebeast!

snippet.title: THEY JUST REVEALED IT!
snippet.description:
LEGO® Batman™: Legacy of the Dark Knight – Official Deluxe Edition Trailer

The LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight Deluxe Edition trailer just dropped and it revealed SO MUCH new gameplay, DLC content, vehicles, costumes, and even our first real look at playable Joker and Harley Quinn gameplay!

In this video, we break down EVERYTHING revealed in the brand-new LEGO Batman Deluxe Edition trailer including:

Batman Beyond DLC Pack
Arkham Trilogy DLC Pack
Party Pack DLC
Joker & Harley Quinn gameplay
New Batmobiles
Mayhem Mode
New Story Mission details
28 DLC costumes
Batcave customization items
Batman Beyond Batmobile
Arkham Knight Batman suit
Harley Quinn & Joker playable reveal
Amusement Mile gameplay
LEGO Batman Easter Eggs and hidden details

We also discuss the new Mayhem Collection arriving in September, which adds brand-new story content, playable villains, Gotham City chaos, and what could be some of the coolest DLC TT Games has ever made for a LEGO game.

The amount of detail, references to Batman Beyond, Batman Arkham, Batman: The Animated Series, DC Comics lore, and LEGO customization in this game continues to look absolutely incredible.

Which DLC pack are YOU most excited for? Batman Beyond, Arkham Trilogy, Party Pack, or the Joker & Harley Quinn Mayhem Collection?

LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight is the brand-new open world LEGO game from TT Games and Warner Bros. Games, bringing Batman’s 86-year history to life with a mix of iconic DC lore, LEGO humor, and epic action.

🌆 Open World Gotham – Explore famous locations like Ace Chemicals, Wayne Tower, Arkham Asylum, and Gotham Botanical Gardens.
🦇 Playable Heroes – Batman, Jim Gordon, Robin, Nightwing, Batgirl, Catwoman, and Talia al Ghul, each with unique gadgets and combat styles.
😈 Classic Villains – The Joker, Penguin, Poison Ivy, Ra’s al Ghul, Bane, and more.
🚗 Vehicles – Drive legendary Batmobiles and Batcycles.
🎮 Gameplay – New combat system with fluid combos, takedowns, and gadget-based action.
👥 Co-Op – Two-player local couch co-op (no online co-op).
💰 No Microtransactions – 100% complete experience with no in-game purchases.
✨ Bonus Suit – Unlock the Golden Age Batsuit (Detective Comics #27, 1939) by signing up for a free WB Games account.

Platforms: PlayStation®5, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch™ 2, and PC (Steam & Epic Games Store).
Price/Pre-Order: Not available yet, but wishlisting is open now.

snippet.title: Grand Theft Auto VI Trailer 3 | Rockstar Games
snippet.description:
Grand Theft Auto VI Trailer 3 is here. Return to the neon-soaked streets of Vice City in Rockstar Games’ most ambitious open-world experience ever created. Follow Jason and Lucia through a brutal criminal underworld filled with high-speed chases, dangerous heists, luxury lifestyles, chaos, betrayal, and explosive action across the state of Leonida. Featuring ultra-realistic graphics, next-generation gameplay, cinematic storytelling, massive open-world exploration, dynamic weather, realistic NPC AI, and breathtaking visuals powered by modern gaming technology.

Experience the evolution of the Grand Theft Auto series with stunning environments, immersive detail, realistic physics, intense shootouts, muscle cars, nightlife, beaches, criminal empires, and unforgettable characters. GTA VI pushes open-world gaming to a completely new level.

Watch the official Grand Theft Auto VI Trailer 3 from Rockstar Games in 4K UHD.
